caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV, focusing on Nigerian politics. The left side of the screen shows a man wearing a traditional red cap and patterned shirt, likely discussing political matters. The right side displays a group of people enthusiastically waving flags and holding signs, suggesting a political rally or gathering. The text overlay reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU," indicating that the segment is centered around Bola Tinubu's political campaign or statement. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of political engagement and support for Tinubu's candidacy. The video is available on DStv channel 408 and StarTimes channel 308.
